scripts._comment: node-anrop direkt bypassar npm cmd-shim som kraschar pa OneDrive-pathar med mellanslag (Windows). Funkar oforandrat pa Linux/Netlify.
scripts.typecheck: npm run tsc:check && node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p tsconfig.legacy.json --noEmit
scripts.build: npm run tsc:check && npm run tsc:legacy && node node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js build
